name: adv-tools
description: Codex skills for the local advisor CLI, exposed as $adv-xxx commands.

interface.shortDescription: Use local advisor reviews, critiques, vision, SOTA research, config, and gates from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Adv Tools exposes the local advisor CLI through Codex skills named adv-review, adv-critique, adv-plan, adv-vision, adv-sota, adv-config, adv-doctor, and adv-gate. The SOTA skill supports normal/deep research profiles, with normal as the default, and writes summary.json with source health and quality buckets. The plugin is a lightweight Codex facade; advisor itself never launches Codex.
defaultPrompt: Run $adv-doctor to check advisor/plugin readiness before using external advisors.
Run $adv-review on this implementation plan with relevant files.
Run $adv-critique on this diff and classify blockers vs improvements.
Run $adv-sota to research the latest source-backed state of a domain.
